short_summary: POC overview with 7 tasks, hypotheses, and execution order. Content integrated into poc-context.json.
Design system implemented: HSL tokens in globals.css, Tailwind config, 18+ shadcn/ui components, playground pages, fonts via next/font.
CSS HSL channel tokens in globals.css and tailwind.config.ts. Figma token metadata in design-system.meta.json.
18+ shadcn/ui components in components/ui/ with cn(), className forwarding, and playground page.
Visual audit QA checklist and design system showcase page. Figma assets in .agents/figma/.
QA checklist for design system visual audit tasks.
Full Drizzle schema with users, scripts, script_files, audio_files, comments (soft delete), ratings (unique index). 4 SQL migration files + storage buckets SQL.
Google OAuth via Supabase, callback route, session middleware, protected route group, usersRouter with upsert.
Multi-step publish form (4 steps matching Figma), client-side upload to Supabase Storage, scriptsRouter with 6 endpoints, script detail page.
PDFViewer with next/dynamic ssr:false, Zustand store, comments sidebar with page anchoring, commentsRouter with soft delete.
HomeClient with SSR prefetch, genre filter, search with 300ms debounce, featured section, responsive ScriptCard grid.
Public profile page, account settings with avatar upload, ratingsRouter with self-rating guard, StarRating with TanStack invalidation.
